pilot_first_policy: Do not expand acceptance to 007/008/009/015/022 until 006 passes real CAD, strict v4/v6, and application UI screenshot manual judgement.
preconditions: SolidWorks must be responsive and unsaved-document risk must be cleared before real CAD rerun.
Only the 006 pilot may run first, and it must run through JobRuntimeFacade/QProcess with the global SolidWorks lock.
Original SLDPRT/SLDASM files must not be modified; use run_dir/input_work copies.
Do not lower QC thresholds and do not count Note/OCR/QC sidecar text as DisplayDim.
Every accepted drawing needs application Drawing Review UI screenshot evidence and a complete manual visual checklist.

section_policy.reason: same-name reference uses only standard/named and projected views

sheet_template_policy.reason: same-name reference controls visible sheet/titleblock style

correction_checks: generated real DisplayDim count must be >= display_dim_floor
generated semantic layout centers must stay within layout_tolerance_norm
automatic section/detail views must remain disabled when section_policy forbids them

current_ui_status.latest_manual_required_correction: Fix the 006 reference-outline scale solver so it chooses larger, reference-matching outlines instead of shrinking through 1:10/1:20/1:50; preserve hole_diameter and hole_pitch through final arrange/reopen; then regenerate title block and manufacturing notes in the compact reference style before another locked 006-only CAD rerun.

checklist_notes.reference_match: The generated drawing does not visually match the same-name reference: view outlines, dimensional scheme, title block, and note placement differ substantially.
checklist_notes.view_layout: Four views are visible, but the generated views are bunched and scaled/positioned unlike the reference; the main long views no longer read as the reference front/top layout.
checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The screenshot shows many dimensions, but the visible dimension scheme is not reference-like and the latest trace still loses semantic coverage after final arrange/reopen.
checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimensions, leaders, arrows, and text are clustered around the central views; several labels overlap visually or are too dense for manufacturing review.
checklist_notes.title_block: The generated lower-right title/data area is not equivalent to the compact reference title block and remains structurally incomplete.
checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Notes are present, but they do not match the reference note style/placement and are not visually sufficient as manufacturing instructions.

findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the reference image.
The new run improved live DrawingView recovery and produced current-run SLDDRW/PDF/DXF/PNG artifacts, but visual acceptance still fails.
Layout scale solving moved in the wrong direction and exhausted the scale ladder; the final generated views are much smaller/bunched compared with the reference.
DisplayDim count reached 21, but the visual result remains unreadable/crowded and semantic target coverage still regressed after the final arrange pass.
API/reference metrics are supporting evidence only; the UI screenshot review is the final gate and remains FAIL.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated drawing does not visually match the same-name reference: view outlines, dimensional scheme, title block, and note placement differ substantially.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: Four views are visible, but the generated views are bunched and scaled/positioned unlike the reference; the main long views no longer read as the reference front/top layout.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: The screenshot shows many dimensions, but the visible dimension scheme is not reference-like and the latest trace still loses semantic coverage after final arrange/reopen.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimensions, leaders, arrows, and text are clustered around the central views; several labels overlap visually or are too dense for manufacturing review.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated lower-right title/data area is not equivalent to the compact reference title block and remains structurally incomplete.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: Notes are present, but they do not match the reference note style/placement and are not visually sufficient as manufacturing instructions.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.

acceptance_requirements: Fresh run artifacts must be under drw_output/runs/<run_id>/ and must include SLDDRW/PDF/DXF/PNG plus manifest and event log.
Worker stdout/event logs must include job_started, progress, heartbeat, and job_finished or job_failed with reason.
Generated view count and view type counts must match the same-name reference standard.
Projected views must be true projected views, not independent named-view substitutes.
Final persisted/exported real SolidWorks DisplayDim count must meet or exceed the same-name reference floor.
006 reference-intent dimensions must record target key, view slot, selected entity, add method, before/after count, target coverage, and persisted-after-reopen evidence.
Note/OCR/QC sidecar/visual-only text must not be counted as DisplayDim.
Application Drawing Review UI screenshot review must pass with every required manual visual checklist item true.

validation_commands.locked_real_cad_regression: Run one JobRuntimeFacade/QProcess CAD job for "LB26001-A-04-006" only after readiness is clear; do not call SolidWorks from the UI thread.
